instruction:
Industry Research polled teenagers on sunscreen use. The survey revealed that 46\% of teenage girls and 30\% of teenage boys regularly use sunscreen before going out in the sun.
identify the two populations [ANS] A. teenage girls and teenage boys who use sunscreen regularly  B. all teenagers  C. teenage girls and teenage boys  D. None of the above
identify the specified attribute [ANS] A. uses sunscreen before going out in the sun  B. being a teenage girl or a teenage boy  C. being a teenager  D. None of the above
are the proportions 0.46 (46\%) and 0.30 (30\%) population proportions or a sample proportions? [ANS] A. sample proportions  B. population proportions  C. None of the above
